description: Curated, accessible color palettes covering modern dark UI, retro arcade, pastel, monochrome, and warm/cool themes. Each palette is a complete CSS-variable token set (--color-bg, --color-fg, --color-accent, etc.) so the model picks one block and uses semantic names throughout — no more hallucinated hex codes that don't pass contrast checks.
license: Token sets curated from public-domain palette references (Tailwind CSS, NES PPU public domain, Game Boy hardware-emulated colors). Hex codes are not copyrightable; design + curation is ISC-compatible.
